narrative.headline: 2020 Toyota Tacoma: fuel and propulsion lead the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 85 complaints with NHTSA. The most reported area is the fuel/propulsion system at 25%, followed by the power train and the engine (each 16%) and the service brakes (15%). No fires and no deaths are reported across any area. The only crash and injury on record are tied to the engine, so it is the one area worth extra attention on a test drive.

issues.blurb: The most reported area: 21 reports (25%). No crashes, fires, injuries, or deaths are linked to it.
